title: Ender Christmas Plus
description: Let Ender Chests have a Christmas texture too - a port of Ender Christmas to modern versions.
body: This mod adds a Christmas texture for the ender chest, correcting a wrongdoing done by Mojang in 22w03a. The Christmas texture works the same as vanilla Christmas Chest textures, and will be visible only during Christmas. This port also adds a config option for Christmas Every Day, enabling Christmas Chests every day of the year. On 1.21.9 and above, this is a resource pack instead. This mod is client-side only, and not required on servers. It is purely visual and does not change any behavior. ## Installation Ender Christmas Plus is a completely clientside mod for Fabric and NeoForge. - On Fabric, [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) is required. - On NeoForge, no dependencies are required. - On 1.21.8 and below, mod settings are available with [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/mod-menu) (only required on Fabric) and [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config). ## Credits This is a port of tropheusj's [Ender Christmas](https://modrinth.com/mod/ender-christmas) to Architectury 1.21, allowing for the mod to be used on both Fabric and NeoForge. Ender Christmas is available under the [MIT License](https://github.com/TropheusJ/Ender-Christmas/blob/1.18/LICENSE). Ender Chest Texture was originally provided by [ZenithKnight](https://github.com/ZenithRogue), and is governed under the same license. Mod Menu/Cloth Config integration is based on the integration present in [idwtialsimmoedm](https://modrinth.com/mod/idwtialsimmoedm) under its [MIT License](https://github.com/gliscowo/idwtialsimmoedm/blob/1.21/LICENSE).
